creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
On Tue, 24 Jun 2008 20:40:02 GMT
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/124958'.
> The individual assigned to look at your
> report is: freebsd-ports-bugs. 
> 
> You can access the state of your problem report at any time
> via this link:
> 
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=124958
> 
> >Category:       ports
> >Responsible:    freebsd-ports-bugs
> >Synopsis:       Net port: devel/p5-ZConf   A configuration system
> >allowing for either file or LDAP backed storage. Arrival-Date:
> >Tue Jun 24 20:40:02 UTC 2008

Fix the Net::LDAP requirement.

--- Makefile.orig       2008-06-24 13:44:35.000000000 -0500
+++ Makefile    2008-06-24 18:57:02.000000000 -0500
@@ -15,6 +15,8 @@
 MAINTAINER=    vvelox@vvelox.net
 COMMENT=       Provides a methode for creating paths in LDAP simply.
 
+RUN_DEPENDS=    ${SITE_PERL}/Net/LDAP/Entry.pm:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-perl-ldap
+
 PERL_CONFIGURE=        yes
 
 MAN3=          Net::LDAP::Makepath.3
